import { CCol, CFormCheck, CFormLabel, CRow } from '@coreui/react'; import React, { useEffect, useState } from 'react'; import { v4 as uuidv4 } from 'uuid'; import { useParams } from 'react-router-dom'; import GetBusinessDetails from 'src/components/services/GetBusinessDetails'; import Linkify from "react-linkify"; import { download_file } from 'src/utils/Common'; import GoBackComponent from 'src/utils/GoBackComponent'; import StatusDrop from 'src/utils/StatusDrop'; function businessDetails() { const { id } = useParams(); const [businessDetails, setBusinessDetails] = useState({}); const getBusinessDetailsItem = async () => { const business = await GetBusinessDetails.getBusinessDetails(id); setBusinessDetails(business); } useEffect(() => { getBusinessDetailsItem(); }, [id]); return ( <>
Action

Looking For

{businessDetails?.lookingFor && businessDetails?.lookingFor?.length > 0 && businessDetails?.lookingFor.map((item, index) => ( ))}

Estimated Budget

Tenure:
{businessDetails?.estimatedBudget?.type}
Currency Type:
{businessDetails?.location?.country === "India" ? "INR" : "USD"}
Amount:
{businessDetails?.estimatedBudget?.amount}

Other Details

Category:
{businessDetails?.category}
Brief Requirement:
( {decoratedText} )}> {businessDetails?.briefRequirement ? businessDetails?.briefRequirement : ""}
Detailed Requirement:
( {decoratedText} )}> {businessDetails?.detailedRequirement ? businessDetails?.detailedRequirement : ""}

Attachments

{businessDetails?.attachmentList?.length === 0 ? No attachments found. : businessDetails?.attachmentList && businessDetails?.attachmentList.map((attachements, index) => (
download_file(e, attachements?.attachmentUrl)} rel="noopener noreferrer">
)) }

Personal details

First Name:
{businessDetails?.firstName}
Last Name:
{businessDetails?.lastName}
Contact Number:
{businessDetails?.contactNumber}
Email:
{businessDetails?.email}
Company Name:
{businessDetails?.companyName}
Website:
( {decoratedText} )}> {businessDetails?.website ? businessDetails?.website : ""}

Location

Address: {businessDetails?.location?.address}

City:
{businessDetails?.location?.city}
State:
{businessDetails?.location?.state}
Country:
{businessDetails?.location?.country}
) } export default businessDetails
